overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a rainy night in a historic New Orleans-style city. The player moves from open cobblestone streets past neon-signed restaurants, through narrow alleys with NPCs, and into a courtyard. Atmospheric lighting from gas lamps and wet reflections create a cinematic mood.

metal streetcar tracks embedded in the cobblestones

stacked wooden barrels on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a historic district, with the camera moving forward along wet cobblestone streets featuring tram tracks. A large historic hotel building dominates the left side while street lamps cast warm reflections on the glistening ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon restaurant signage

hanging red paper lanterns outside storefronts

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the historic district where the red neon glow of the Jade Dragon Restaurant sign becomes the focal point. The street narrows slightly, lined with historic buildings featuring wrought iron balconies and hanging red lanterns.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, moving in the opposite direction
turning right into a narrower alleyway with walls closing in

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a narrower street where a horse-drawn carriage passes by. The environment becomes more enclosed as the camera approaches a dark alleyway entrance between tall buildings.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, covered alleyway where brick walls rise on both sides. An NPC stands watching from a doorway marked with Chinese characters, as the camera approaches a stone archway leading deeper into the passage.

events.description: exiting the covered passage into an open courtyard with a building under construction

agents.ego_description: moving through the covered walkway and emerging into the courtyard

large terracotta pots with leafy plants placed along the walkway
multi-story building with wooden scaffolding and illuminated windows
stone tile flooring of the interior courtyard

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, the camera moves through a covered walkway lined with potted plants before emerging into a quiet courtyard. A large building with wooden scaffolding and warm lights dominates the far end of the courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rainy historic district that shifts from an open streetscape to a more intimate, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins by gliding along wet cobblestone streets embedded with tram tracks, where a large historic hotel looms to the left and street lamps cast warm reflections across the glistening ground. As the camera pushes deeper into the district, the open road narrows and the lighting transitions from the soft glow of lamps to the vibrant red radiance of a Jade Dragon Restaurant sign. The scene then closes in around the viewer, passing historic buildings adorned with wrought iron balconies and hanging red lanterns that frame the rainy night.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling street into the secluded depths of a hidden urban courtyard. It begins by turning right onto a narrower street as a horse-drawn carriage passes, moving toward a dark alleyway entrance framed by tall buildings. As the camera enters the narrow, covered passage, the environment closes in with rising brick walls and a silent figure watching from a doorway marked with Chinese characters. The scene then shifts through a stone archway and along a covered walkway lined with potted plants, gradually opening up into a quiet courtyard. Finally, the camera settles on a large building dominated by wooden scaffolding and warm, atmospheric lights.
